name: Gigapipe
description: ClickHouse-based managed observability platform compatible with Loki, Prometheus, Tempo, and Pyroscope APIs.

seo.title: Gigapipe — Observability / Logging / Tracing
seo.meta_description: Gigapipe: ClickHouse-based managed observability platform compatible with Loki, Prometheus, Tempo, and Pyroscope APIs.

when_to_use: ClickHouse-backed logs storage with Loki-compatible API
Unified observability with Prometheus, Tempo, and Loki
Plug into existing Grafana dashboards instantly

pros: Single ClickHouse backend for logs, metrics, traces, profiles
Drop-in Loki, Prom, Tempo and Pyroscope compatibility
Dramatically lower storage cost at scale
cons: ClickHouse operations expertise required for self-host
Managed service newer than Grafana Cloud
Query performance tuning can surprise teams
Smaller support org than Grafana Labs
review.verdict: Compelling unified ClickHouse observability that undercuts Grafana Cloud on cost, with less polish.
review.best_for: Teams using Grafana OSS who want cheaper managed storage via ClickHouse.
review.not_for: Teams wanting turnkey Datadog-style experience with heavy hand-holding.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Monthly subscription; downgradable next cycle, no explicit peak-lock.
